source.definition: to become familiar with someone or something through experience or discovery

explanation.sourceText: The English verb "to know" originates from the Old English "cnāwan", which is related to the Proto-Germanic root *knew-, meaning to perceive or recognize.
explanation.targetText: Verbul englezesc „to know“ provine din engleza veche „cnāwan“, legat de rădăcina proto-germanică *knew-, care înseamnă a percepe sau recunoaște.

source.additional: Regular verb. It refers to the process of becoming acquainted with a person or thing. It is frequently used in social contexts and carries a positive connotation.

target.definition: a descoperi sau a experimenta pe cineva sau ceva pentru prima dată

explanation.sourceText: The Romanian verb "a cunoaște" comes from the Latin "cognoscere", meaning "to recognize", and is related to the French "connaître". This development shows how deeply the roots of personal relationships are embedded in most languages.
explanation.targetText: Verbul românesc „a cunoaște“ provine din latină „cognoscere“ („a recunoaște“), înrudit cu francezul „connaître“.

target.additional: Regular first conjugation verb (-a). It is central in Romanian language and culture, often used in contexts involving friends, relationships, and new acquaintances.

explanation.sourceText: Refers to the process of discovering or becoming acquainted with a person.
explanation.targetText: Se referă la procesul de a descoperi sau a cunoaște o persoană nouă.

examples.sourceText: I am getting to know new friends.
I have recently gotten to know them.
I will get to know them tomorrow.
I am getting to know new friends.
I have recently gotten to know them.
I will get to know them tomorrow.

learningTips.text: Remember "a cunoaște" sounds like "know" with a Romanian twist; both relate to learning or recognizing something new.
Think of "cunoaște" as "co-know-ash-teh" — like co-knowing or sharing knowledge with someone new.
Link "a cunoaște" with the English word "cognition" which also comes from Latin "cognoscere" meaning to know or recognize.
Use phrases like "Eu cunosc" (I know) to practice and remember the verb in everyday conversation.
